mapper.select: SELECT id, product_type_id, enable_wear_resistant_priority, wear_resistant_paper_types, description, is_active, created_at, updated_at FROM product_type_sort_config ORDER BY id ASC
SELECT id, product_type_id, enable_wear_resistant_priority, wear_resistant_paper_types, description, is_active, created_at, updated_at FROM product_type_sort_config WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT id, product_type_id, enable_wear_resistant_priority, wear_resistant_paper_types, description, is_active, created_at, updated_at FROM product_type_sort_config WHERE product_type_id = #{productTypeId} LIMIT 1

SELECT id, product_type_id, enable_wear_resistant_priority, wear_resistant_paper_types, description, is_active, created_at, updated_at FROM product_type_sort_config WHERE is_active = true ORDER BY id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO product_type_sort_config ( product_type_id, enable_wear_resistant_priority, wear_resistant_paper_types, description, is_active, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{productTypeId}, #{enableWearResistantPriority}, #{wearResistantPaperTypes}, #{description}, #{isActive}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
mapper.update: UPDATE product_type_sort_config SET product_type_id = #{productTypeId}, enable_wear_resistant_priority = #{enableWearResistantPriority}, wear_resistant_paper_types = #{wearResistantPaperTypes}, description = #{description}, is_active = #{isActive}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
